paragraphs: So much house stuff today. Met the tenants…my housemates now. Although we each have our own cottage. Cottage-mates? need a word. Sara is a teacher. 6th grade. Minna is a writer and archivist.

Covered the mundane stuff. Recycling bots collect on Tuesday mornings. Maintenance service once month on the 20th. Joined the carbon account to split bills. We also get some extra credit because now we’re higher density.
A bit awkward doing this with strangers when I grew up here. And it feels unsettling seeing other people’s things in my parents’ house. I’ll get over it. They both seem super nice.
My cottage feels more cluttered than I remember, although these are all my things. I need to set up my workstation and also a kitchen. sigh.
Will deal with it later. Need some cozy time this evening.
